use_cases: Display broker or trading platform information with ratings on financial comparison websites
Show tradable assets and platform statistics for investment decisions
Provide quick overview cards for fintech dashboard or broker comparison pages
Enable users to evaluate multiple brokers through standardized info cards
Link users to detailed broker information from a summary card interface
ai_summary: Interactive Broker Card is a composite card component for displaying financial broker or trading platform information. Features logo, name, tradable assets list, star rating with review count, and account statistics. Uses theme-aware styling with Tailwind CSS variables and includes a subtle radial gradient background effect. Designed for responsive layouts with centered mobile view and left-aligned desktop positioning.
